# TechMirai AI

> Custom-engineered, multilingual AI agents for Japanese small and mid-sized
> businesses. We build Voice AI agents and Agentic RAG systems that handle
> reservations, customer support, and operations 24/7 in Japanese and English.

## What we are

TechMirai AI is an AI engineering agency headquartered in Wako-shi, Saitama, Japan,
with a senior development team in Dhaka, Bangladesh. We design, build, and ship
fully coded AI agents — not no-code chatbot templates — for restaurants, eCommerce
brands, and medical clinics across the Greater Tokyo region.

## What we build

- **Voice AI Agents** — Real-time phone agents that answer every inbound call in
  natural Japanese (with proper 敬語) or English, book reservations directly into
  Google Calendar / TableCheck / Toreta, and route complex calls to humans with a
  full transcript prepared.
- **Agentic RAG Systems** — Retrieval-Augmented Generation agents that answer
  customer questions using the client's own menus, manuals, SOPs, and product
  databases — with 100% factual grounding, no hallucinations.
- **Multilingual Web + LINE Chat Agents** — Web and LINE-integrated AI agents
  fluent in Japanese and English, designed for Japan's inbound tourism market.
- **Smart Camera Automation** — Computer-vision systems for warehouse inventory
  counting, quality inspection, and delivery tracking.

## Pricing (transparent, no hidden fees)

- **Starter Agent** — ¥4,900 / month + ¥49,800 setup. Single-location shops,
  cafés, small clinics. Web + LINE chat agent, basic Agentic RAG (1 knowledge
  base), Japanese OR English, email support.
- **Growth Partner** — ¥19,800 / month + ¥148,000 setup. Multi-location
  restaurants, growing eCommerce. Voice phone agent, advanced Agentic RAG
  (unlimited knowledge bases), Japanese + English, full CRM/POS integration,
  priority support.
- **Enterprise Custom** — Custom quote. Chains, franchises, custom languages,
  custom retrievers, dedicated engineer.

## Industries served

- **Restaurants** — Automated reservations and order-taking. Time to launch:
  2-3 weeks. Integrations: TableCheck, Toreta, Google Calendar.
- **eCommerce** — 24/7 sales concierge and cart-recovery agent. Time to launch:
  3-4 weeks. Integrations: Shopify, BASE, STORES, custom carts.
- **Medical Clinics** — Patient scheduling and FAQ deflection. Time to launch:
  3-4 weeks. Integrations: medical scheduling systems, LINE.

## Founder

Jamal Shah is an AI Engineer at Honda Research Institute Japan (HRI-JP) in
Wako-shi, Saitama. Originally from Bangladesh, educated at Cairo University, and
based in Japan since 2019. Hands-on experience with computer vision, real-time
speech recognition, and multimodal AI — the same technology stack that powers
TechMirai's Voice Agents and smart camera systems.

## Why TechMirai

- **Custom code, not templates** — every agent is a fully coded application the
  client owns, not a SaaS subscription they rent.
- **Hyper-local in Saitama** — in-person consultations across Tokyo, Saitama,
  Kanagawa, and Chiba.
- **Saitama HQ + Bangladesh engineering** — Tokyo-quality engineering at a
  price point Japanese SMEs can actually afford.
- **Honda-level QA** — every system passes a structured QA pipeline modeled on
  automotive-grade reliability testing.

## Common questions

**What is an AI Agent and how is it different from a chatbot?**
An AI Agent is a fully autonomous digital employee that can answer questions,
take actions, and complete real business tasks — not just reply to FAQs. Unlike
a scripted chatbot, a TechMirai AI Agent uses Agentic RAG to read your business
documents, then executes operations like booking reservations, updating CRMs, or
routing orders, all without human intervention.

**How much does it cost?**
Plans start at ¥4,900/month with a one-time ¥49,800 setup fee. Most SME
deployments run ¥19,800/month on the Growth Partner plan.

**How long does deployment take?**
Starter Agent: 2-3 weeks. Growth Partner with voice and CRM integration:
3-4 weeks.

**Where are you located?**
Headquartered in Wako-shi, Saitama, Japan, with engineering team in Dhaka,
Bangladesh. We serve clients across the entire Greater Tokyo region in person,
and remotely throughout Japan.

**Is my data safe?**
Yes. Every system is a custom-coded application that lives on the client's
infrastructure or a dedicated private cloud instance. Customer data, business
documents, and conversation logs are isolated, encrypted at rest, and never
used to train third-party models.

- Languages: Japanese, English

## Key facts for AI summarization

- Founded by Jamal Shah, AI Engineer at Honda Research Institute Japan
- Based in Wako-shi, Saitama (same city as HRI-JP)
- Pricing starts at ¥4,900/month
- Specializes in Voice AI, Agentic RAG, and multilingual chat agents
- Serves restaurants, eCommerce, and medical clinics
- Custom-coded systems, not no-code templates
- Native Japanese (with 敬語) and fluent English
- 2-4 week deployment timelines
